source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The diagram shows a shape made from six squares, each measuring $1 \mathrm{~cm}$ by $1 \mathrm{~cm}$. The shape has perimeter of length $14 \mathrm{~cm}$. The zigzag shape is then continued until it has 2013 squares. What is the length, in $\mathrm{cm}$, of the perimeter of the new shape? <image1>
